_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: AFFIX-BATCH-3 (2026-07-15): added the 'Relics of the Apex' loot batch to js/stats.js — 4 prefixes (Furious, Barbed, Bastioned, Titanic) + 4 suffixes (of Fury, of Recoil, of the Aegis, of the Titan), themed to the three apex mechanics the deep hero faces (enrage/ward/thorns) + an apex crown, a fresh motif distinct from Spoils (enemy families) and Trophies (hero prowess). Auto-reachable: makeItem draws rng across the full prefixes/suffixes arrays so pushing onto pre/suf is the only wiring; affixes never render as tiles (scene.js/hero.js untouched, zero symbol-crash risk; browser-verified realms 1-13 all biomes + apex rotation B/T/W/S paint clean, all 8 new affixes render in the char pane). KEY FINDING that EXTENDS the batch-2 loot rule: composition-matching (~60/25/15 offense/hp/armor+def) is NECESSARY BUT NOT SUFFICIENT. A first draft that matched the mix EXACTLY (comp 60/25/15, gScore-avg ~7.5) still eased the win rate +1.46pt (z=3.3 over a 24k-run isolated A/B) — a real stealth-rebalance in the EASY direction. An equipped-gear probe at realms 6-7 found the draft inflated the hero's equipped HP by ~+3.7 (=+18 max HP, pure survivability in the boss-attrition-bound deep game). ENABLER: CRIT is nearly inert in combat (~10% of hits, small multiplier bump) yet FULL-WEIGHT in gScore (combat.js weights every stat equally for auto-equip), so affixes pairing crit WITH hp get over-equipped and smuggle survivability HP onto the hero. PROOF the neutral template avoids it: 'Trophies of the Arena' re-measured at 24k is DEAD neutral (0.00pt, z=-0.01) because it caps crit at 8 and pairs hp with str/agi (honest combat stats). FIX: copied that profile — crit total 8 (not 11), hp paired with str/agi or the defensive block (never crit-heavy), def>=armor, hp kept lean/unconcentrated. Two defensive archetypes (Bastioned, of the Aegis) carry the ~15% armor+def share so it stays offense/HP-LED not pure-offense (pure-offense drifts ~2pt LOW — batch 2). Iterated v1 (+1.46pt) -> v3 crit8/hp14 (+0.88pt, z=1.97) -> v4 hp trimmed to 12 (+0.21pt, z=0.48 — NEUTRAL). Category totals str17/agi8/hp12/hit3/crit8/armor3/def6, comp 63/21/16, gScore max 8 (below the pool's 10 ceiling), luck+magicFind 0 (inert/padding). Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` reads 37.7% (2261/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms across all biomes). JS-all 24.6KB brotli (<=55KB). NEW CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHA for loot runs: crit is a STEALTH power-adder (combat-inert, gScore-full-weight) — cap batch crit at ~8 and DON'T co-locate crit with hp on the same affix, or the batch over-equips and smuggles survivability HP (~+1.5pt easy). Verify with an equipped-gear probe at realms 6-7 (scripts/probe pattern), not just the composition math. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. PRIOR BOSS-MECHANIC-3 (2026-07-15): added 'The Searing Colossus' (red grade 'S'), the THIRD boss mechanic — THORNS, a retaliation foil to enrage/ward. Its molten hide sears back 20% of every blow the hero LANDS (lj.enemy.thorns -> Math.round(heroDamage*0.2), 0 for non-thorns/whiffed), applied in the js/combat.js hero-turn branch AFTER ward zeroing and ONLY when the boss survived the blow, folded into the hero's own log entry (lastAction.reflected) + heroHealth + heroDamageTaken. It is the OPPOSITE lever from its siblings: enrage/ward make the boss survive longer (feeding boss-attrition); thorns never touches the boss's bar or lengthens the duel, it turns the hero's own burst into self-damage (self-scaling with the hero's hit). The deep-realm apex rotation went 2-way (size%2, T/W) -> 3-way (size%3): T Cinderwyrm 5/8/11, W Warden 6/9/12, S Colossus 7/10/13, all red; wired via isBoss('S') + hero.js creaturesAndItemsMap.S + scene.js spriteMap.S (boss sprite [0,9]); selfplay fights bossGradeForRealm so all three are auto-measured. REQUIRED SUPPORT CHANGE: fight() outcome.actor switched from lastAction.actor to `heroHealth>0?'hero':'enemy'` because thorns can drop the hero on the hero's OWN turn (lastAction.actor would miscredit that as a win); thorns is skipped on the killing blow so heroHealth<=0 always means a live boss finished the hero, making the health check EXACTLY equivalent to lastAction.actor for base/enrage/ward and correct for thorns. showFightStat applies lastAction.reflected via hurt() during the hero's strike so the animated health tracks the outcome (harness applies outcome.damage once; neither double-counts). A SIPHON (lifesteal) first draft was built then FULLY REVERTED — weak lever here (isolated A/B swing only ~2.6pt) because the hero's armor cuts boss damage, hence its lifesteal, to a trickle; thorns scales off the hero's LARGE damage instead. BALANCE: PEER by construction — reuses the Warden's exact defensive block [5,7,82,1,3,5,2] (modest HP, mechanic carries the threat), thorns tuned to land the isolated all-Colossus rate level with the siblings. Measured: isolated all-Colossus A/B thorns OFF 45.4% -> ON 38.4% at 4000 runs (-7.0pt, ~9 sigma => LOAD-BEARING); isolated ON 38.4% ~= Cinderwyrm ~38.5% / Warden ~39% (PEER). Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` reads 37.7% (2262/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms across all biomes). Browser-verified on dist/: zero console errors, rotation T,W,S,T,W,S, a live realm-7 Colossus fight fired thorns 52x with the killing blow reflecting 0, all grades render crash-free. JS-all 23.4KB brotli (<=55KB). CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHAS: (1) thorns is the last fight-SHORTENING 'shape' — a future mechanic that heals/regens lengthens fights (bad at 400ms/step animation) and is weak vs the hero's armor; prefer hero-damage-scaling or tempo. (2) outcome.actor is now the shared health-based contract — a mechanic that can kill the hero on its OWN turn must skip the killing blow like thorns, or re-derive attribution. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. PRIOR AFFIX-BATCH-2 (2026-07-14): added the 'Trophies of the Arena' loot batch to js/stats.js — 4 gladiatorial prefixes (Gladiatorial, Bloodthirsty, Undaunted, Ironbound) + 4 arena-honour suffixes (of the Arena, of Conquest, of the Champion, of the Bulwark), themed to the hero's own prowess (distinct from Spoils' enemy-family theme). Auto-reachable: makeItem draws rng across the full prefixes/suffixes arrays, so pushing onto pre/suf is the only wiring; affixes never render as map tiles (scene.js/hero.js untouched, zero symbol-crash risk). MAJOR BALANCE FINDING that REVISES the old carried-forward gotcha: the 'keep loot offense/HP-first, zero armor/defense' heuristic is STALE post-rebalance and NO LONGER neutral. Two different PURE-OFFENSE drafts BOTH measured ~1.9pt LOW in a 10k-run isolated A/B (baseline ~38.9% vs batch ~37.0%, z~3.9 pooled) — not noise. An equipped-gear probe explained it: with the win rate now boss-attrition-bound (~72% of losses) and armor being %-mitigation that compounds hardest at depth, the loot pool sits near an offense/defense SWEET SPOT. Pure-offense affixes out-gScore the hero's defensive items and STRIP ~4 pts of armor+defense off its boss-fight gear (str/crit +5-6 each but armor -1.5 / defense -2.6), turning it glass-cannon and costing the ~1.9pt. FIX = composition-match the pool's own budget mix (~61% offense / ~24% hp / ~15% armor+defense): the batch stays offense/HP-LED (6 of 8 affixes) but two defensive gladiator archetypes (Ironbound [1,0,0,1,0,0,2,3], of the Bulwark [0,0,0,3,0,0,1,3]) carry the ~15% armor/def share so it adds 'more of the same' and doesn't shift what the hero equips. RESULT: balance-NEUTRAL — fresh isolated 10k A/B baseline 37.76% vs batch 38.50% (+0.74pt, within noise; batch == the pooled 3x10k baseline mean of 38.50%), and the equipped-gear probe showed armor/defense restored to baseline (24.8/36.0 vs 24.3/34.9). Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` reads 38.5% (2312/6000) — IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms). of the Champion (gScore 10) ties of the Cinderwyrm as the suffix ceiling; luck (idx2) stays 0 (inert). NEW CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHA for loot runs: do NOT ship pure-offense affixes — MATCH the pool's ~15% armor/defense composition, or the win rate drifts ~2pt low (the game is now mitigation-limited, not damage-limited). The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base stays the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
